Combine all liquid ingredients, salt and sugar in a 22 quart cambro or otherwise appropriate container
Using a large immersion blender, combine ingredients until salt and sugar are dissolved
Wipe Konbu sheets with a damp towel.
Using the side of a large knife or bottom of a clean pan, crush the peeled ginger
Add konbu and ginger to vinegar mixture.
Store at room temperature for 24 hours until use
After 24 hours, store in a cooler environment to slow the steeping of the ginger and konbu.
Strain vinegar before use, reserving the solids to continue steeping and providing depth of flavor.
